chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 4277 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 18923/24 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 19.02.2026 Mr. Rajesh Kumar, Advocate for the Respondents No. 2 to 4. Mr. Kalash A. Vaswani, AAG. ---------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. Learned counsel for the Respondents No. 2 to 4 submits that the premises of the Petitioner were earlier raided on the suspicion that edible oil was being manufactured therein, while the Petitioner subsequently raising the plea that his manufacture was that of Soap and has no relation with the matters of foods. He submits that no further action has been taken by the Respondents or contemplated for the time being and that if any action is to be taken on suspicion that the Petitioner is engaged in food business, a notice however firstly be issued requiring him to register with the Authority. Under the circumstances, the purpose of this Petition appears to have been served. The same stands disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
